query:
-- Statistiche globali
SELECT 
  COUNT(*) as total_sent,
  SUM(CASE WHEN total_opened > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as total_opened,
  ROUND(SUM(CASE WHEN total_opened > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0 / COUNT(*), 2) as open_rate,
  SUM(CASE WHEN status = 'unsubscribed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as unsubscribed,
  MAX(last_sent_at) as last_sent_at
FROM subscribers
WHERE status IN ('active', 'unsubscribed');

-- Top 10 iscritti che hanno aperto
SELECT email, total_opened, last_opened_at
FROM subscribers
WHERE total_opened > 0
ORDER BY last_opened_at DESC
LIMIT 10;

-- Aperture per ora nelle ultime 24 ore
SELECT 
  DATE_FORMAT(FROM_UNIXTIME(opened_at / 1000), '%H:00') as ora,
  COUNT(*) as aperture
FROM email_opens
WHERE opened_at > (UNIX_TIMESTAMP() - 86400) * 1000
GROUP BY ora
ORDER BY ora;

-- Totale aperture registrate nella tabella email_opens
SELECT COUNT(*) as total_opens_tracked, COUNT(DISTINCT subscriber_id) as unique_openers
FROM email_opens;
